$doc: Codex delivery map. hooks.json is symlinked whole-file (Codex doesn't rewrite it; doctor asserts it stays a symlink) and carries the SessionStart injector that delivers global/AGENTS.md as additionalContext (additive — NOT a symlink over ~/.codex/AGENTS.md, which would clobber the user's own global instructions). Skills go to ~/.agents/skills (Codex reads it natively). config.toml is merged, not linked.

links.note: Codex reads ~/.agents/skills natively; shared with OpenCode/Cursor
SessionStart injector — emits global/AGENTS.md as additionalContext (additive; the user's ~/.codex/AGENTS.md is untouched and still loads)

retiredLinks.note: REMOVED: the whole-file symlink clobbered the user's global instructions and Codex has no @import — replaced by the SessionStart injector hook. leos-doctor flags a leftover clone-symlink here.

machineLocal.note: empty neutral CODEX_HOME for the codex external seat's recursion isolation (when the host is NOT Codex)
